stats..validate: newData.hasChildren(['totalVisitors', 'indiaCount', 'lastUpdated']) && newData.child('totalVisitors').isNumber() && newData.child('indiaCount').isNumber() && newData.child('lastUpdated').isNumber() && (!data.exists() || (newData.child('totalVisitors').val() >= data.child('totalVisitors').val() && newData.child('indiaCount').val() >= data.child('indiaCount').val()))
